series_metadata.series_description: Any other record not specifically mentioned in the Pharmacy Services retention schedule that documents dispensing or distribution of medication.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 3 years, then destroy NOTE: Dispensing records maintained via an automated data processing system must be readily retrievable (CRT display or hard copy printout) within 3 working days, excluding holidays or weekends. ; Paper: Retain 3 years, then destroy NOTE: Dispensing records maintained via an automated data processing system must be readily retrievable (CRT display or hard copy printout) within 3 working days, excluding holidays or weekends., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
